# cortexcloud_cloudsec_rules (Data Source)

Provides a filtered list of Cloud Security detection rules for Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block, Optional) Filter criteria for the rules. Use field/type/value for simple filters, or operator with nested criteria for complex AND/OR logic. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `search_from` (Number) The starting index for pagination (0-based).
- `search_to` (Number) The ending index for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `filter_count` (Number) The number of rules matching the filter criteria.
- `id` (String) Static identifier for the data source.
- `rules` (Attributes List) The list of CloudSec detection rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))
- `total_count` (Number) The total number of rules available.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Optional:

- `field` (String) The field to filter on (e.g., 'severity', 'enabled', 'system_default', 'cloudType').
- `type` (String) The type of filter (e.g., 'EQ', 'NEQ', 'CONTAINS').
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.


<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `asset_types` (List of String) Array of asset type identifiers.
- `class` (String) Rule class (e.g., 'config' for CSPM rules).
- `compliance_metadata` (Attributes List) List of compliance metadata with control IDs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--compliance_metadata))
- `compliance_standards` (List of String) List of compliance standard identifiers.
- `created_by` (String) User who created the rule.
- `created_on` (Number) Creation timestamp (epoch milliseconds).
- `description` (String) Detailed rule description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the rule (UUID format).
- `labels` (List of String) Custom labels.
- `last_modified_by` (String) User who last modified the rule.
- `last_modified_on` (Number) Last modification timestamp (epoch milliseconds).
- `module` (String) Module the rule belongs to.
- `name` (String) Unique rule name.
- `providers` (List of String) Cloud providers derived from asset_types.
- `severity` (String) Rule severity level (low, medium, high, critical, informational).
- `system_default` (Boolean) Indicates if this is a system default rule.
- `type` (String) Rule type (e.g., 'DETECTION').

<a id="nestedatt--rules--compliance_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.compliance_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `control_id` (String) Compliance control identifier.
- `control_name` (String) Full name of the compliance control.
- `standard_id` (String) Compliance standard identifier.
- `standard_name` (String) Full name of the compliance standard.
